steps.title: Scale both dimensions
steps.content: A $50\%$ increase multiplies each dimension by $1.5$.

steps.title: Scale the area
steps.content:
Area uses length times width, so the scale factor is
$$1.5\cdot1.5=2.25$$

steps.title: Find the copy area
steps.content:
Multiply the original area by the area scale factor.
$$350\cdot2.25=787.5$$
The answer is 787.5.
